meta.title: AKIN Visuals — Video Editing for Coaches & Personal Brands
meta.description: AKIN Visuals helps coaches and personal brands turn raw footage into high-retention videos that drive views and inbound clients.

hero.label: Trusted by creators generating 100K–1M+ views
hero.sub: We help coaches and personal brands turn raw content into consistent views, engagement, and inbound clients through strategic video editing.
hero.trust: High-retention editing • Strategic clipping • Consistent output

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.body: AKIN Visuals is a boutique video editing studio built for coaches and personal brands who want to grow online. We don't just cut footage — we build content strategies that turn every video into a growth asset. With us, you never have to worry about editing again.

portfolio.label: Our Work
portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.sub: See how we turn raw footage into high-retention content for coaches and personal brands.
portfolio.ytCardDesc: Long-form videos edited for maximum retention and growth on YouTube.
portfolio.ttCardDesc: Short-form clips built for daily posting, hooks, and viral growth.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Services
services.sub: Three ways we help coaches and personal brands grow online.
services.s1Desc: High-retention, story-driven videos designed to keep viewers engaged from start to finish. Structured storytelling, clean professional editing, optimized for YouTube and personal brands.
services.s2Desc: Consistent, high-quality clips designed for daily posting and growth. Hook optimization, fast pacing, captions and platform formatting — built for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.
services.s3Desc: We edit your long-form content and generate multiple short-form clips from it — giving you consistent output across every platform. Built to maximize every piece of content you create.

caseStudies.label: Proven Results
caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.sub: Real numbers from real clients — here's what happens when strategy meets editing.
caseStudies.clickHint: Click a row to see the full case study

testimonials.label: What our clients say
testimonials.title: Direct Feedback
testimonials.t1: AKIN completely redefined our brand's visual identity. The pacing and color work on our latest documentary were simply world-class. Truly professional.
testimonials.t2Q: What did you think of the speed and quality?
testimonials.t2: As a creator, I need an editor who 'gets it'. The turnaround speed and technical precision AKIN brings to every TikTok and Reel is unmatched.
testimonials.t3Q: What did working with AKIN bring you?
testimonials.t3: Our YouTube channel grew from 5K to 40K subscribers in 3 months. AKIN thinks along with strategy, not just editing.

contact.label: Book a Call
contact.title: Tell us about your content goals
contact.sub: Book a call and we'll map out the best content system for your brand. We reply within 24 hours.
contact.formVolumeLabel: How much content do you want to produce?
contact.formGoalsLabel: Tell us about your goals or current challenges
contact.formGoalsPh: e.g. I want to grow my YouTube channel and post Reels consistently but I don't have time to edit...
